planning.reason: Replacement header is not required for this targeted mutation, but true BGZF header patching is not implemented safely in this slice.

notes: Header-only mutation was applied or planned.
This command modifies only BAM header metadata; it does not add, remove, or replace per-record RG:Z tags in alignment records.

error.message: The requested read group could not be updated because it does not exist in the BAM header.
error.detail: No @RG record with ID=rg_missing was found.
error.hint: Use --add-rg to add a new read group or specify an existing RG ID.
